---
title: gr20
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557420/gr20_20180812_gq1i2o.png
description: Vue sur la première journée du GR20, Corse
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2018/08/12
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557420/gr20_20180812_gq1i2o.png)
